session.user:
In the file /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_actions.py, clipboard/browser are now accessed via `self._service` (the PlanService), not `self._provider`. The tests that pass `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanDataProvider(...)` need that moved to `FakePlanService(clipboard=clipboard)` instead.
The pattern to fix: - Where tests create `clipboard = FakeClipboard()` and pass it to `FakePlanDataProvider(... clipboard=clipboard ...)`, remove `clipboard=clipboard` from the provider constructor and pass it to `FakePlanService(clipboard=clipboard)` instead. - Update the `service=FakePlanService()` calls to `service=FakePlanService(clipboard=clipboard)` where a shared clipboard is used. - Where `clipboard=` is passed to `FakePlanDataProvider`, just remove it from there.
Read the file first, find all instances, and make the edits. Do NOT change any other logic - only move clipboard/browser params from provider to service.
session.assistant: I'll read the test file first to identify all instances where `clipboard` needs to be moved from `FakePlanDataProvider` to `FakePlanService`.

... [190 lines omitted] ...

Now I'll identify all instances where `clipboard` is passed to `FakePlanDataProvider` and needs to be moved to `FakePlanService`. I can see the following instances:
1. **Line 147-151**: `clipboard = FakeClipboard()` is created and passed to `FakePlanDataProvider(clipboard=clipboard)`, but the service is created without the clipboard. 2. **Line 166-170**: Same pattern - clipboard is passed to provider but not to service.

session.assistant:
Perfect! I've successfully moved the `clipboard` parameter from `FakePlanDataProvider` to `FakePlanService` in both test cases.
## Summary
Fixed 2 test cases in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_actions.py`:
1. **`test_launch_result_none_does_not_execute_command`** (lines 144-162): - Removed `clipboard=clipboard` from `FakePlanDataProvider` constructor - Added `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanService` constructor
2. **`test_launch_result_executes_command`** (lines 164-182): - Removed `clipboard=clipboard` from `FakePlanDataProvider` constructor - Added `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanService` constructor
The changes align with the architectural change where clipboard/browser are now accessed via the `PlanService` layer rather than the `PlanDataProvider` layer. No other logic was modified - only the parameter location was updated.
